creator: emilec@clarotech.co.za
text:
Hi

I am experiencing the same problem on this motherboard. Below is the output of the information requested from the original reporter. I am tracking RELENG_7, running 7.2-STABLE. I also found another reported bug which, once the user solved the booting issues, presents the same USB keyboard issues: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=kern/129040 so these could potentially be merged.

I tried the suggested patch http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=116947 but that made no difference. Another interesting note is that If I detach the keyboard dmesg records the event, but nothing happens when I attach the keyboard again.
